scripts.release: echo 'Use: pnpm release:patch|minor|major or pnpm release:dry' && exit 1
scripts.release:patch: git push origin main && gh workflow run release-all.yml -f release_type=patch -f packages=all
scripts.release:minor: git push origin main && gh workflow run release-all.yml -f release_type=minor -f packages=all
scripts.release:major: git push origin main && gh workflow run release-all.yml -f release_type=major -f packages=all
scripts.release:cli: git push origin main && gh workflow run release-all.yml -f release_type=patch -f packages=cli
scripts.release:mcp: git push origin main && gh workflow run release-all.yml -f release_type=patch -f packages=maproom-mcp
scripts.release:vscode: git push origin main && gh workflow run release-all.yml -f release_type=patch -f packages=vscode
